calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Continued To Jul-14-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Root appeared via zoom for Lalaine Villamor (petitioner).
Thomas Barclay appeared via zoom for Probate Advance LLC.

Mr. Root stated that He was unable to file the status report and is requesting a 90 day continuance, currently the administrator hired a council to initiate the eviction process, that there are several vehicles that need to be removed from the property, And that they will need time to clean up the property to get it ready for the sale.

The matter is continued to July 14, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Fajardo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Harold Root appeared via zoom.
Jeffrey Coleman appeared via zoom for Probate Advance, LLC (objector).
Steve Shroeder appeared via zoom for Inheritance Funding Company.

Discussion was held regarding the property being sold, that there were several issues with the property, that there were issues with the financing, and that they will file a new petition when they are ready. The matter is taken off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
